name: Sea Kings
description: ‍ Sea Kings – Clash of Pirates Rule the Waves. Crush the Competition. Become the King of the Sea! Set sail in Sea Kings – Clash of Pirates, the ultimate naval battle game where you command your own pirate ship and fight to dominate the high seas! Blast enemy ships with cannons, unlock powerful weapons, and upgrade your vessel to survive wave after wave of fierce battles. Intense Ship-to-Ship Battles Lock on, fire your cannons, and watch your enemies sink! Battle rival pirates in thrilling real-time combat packed with action and strategy. Upgrade Your Pirate Ship Improve your firepower, armor, speed, and special weapons.
